parameters.query: query RulesByPhase($phaseId: ID!, $first: Int!, $after: String) { phase(id: $phaseId) { id name cards(first: $first, after: $after) { edges { node { id title fields { field { id label type } value report_value array_value } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } } }
parameters.variables: ={{ { phaseId: $node['Init Run'].json.prepConfig.rulesPhaseId, first: Number($node['Init Run'].json.runContext.flags.rulesPageSize || 50), after: (() => { const a = ($json.after ?? null); if (a === null) return null; const s = String(a).trim(); if (!s || s.toLowerCase() === 'null') return null; return s; })() } }}

parameters.query: query FindInvoicesByCompetencia($pipeId: ID!, $fieldId: String!, $competencia: String!, $first: Int!, $after: String) { findCards(pipeId: $pipeId, first: $first, after: $after, search: { fieldId: $fieldId, fieldValue: $competencia }) { edges { node { id title fields { field { id label type } value report_value array_value } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }
parameters.variables: ={{ { pipeId: $node['Init Run'].json.prepConfig.invoicesPipeId, fieldId: $node['Init Run'].json.prepConfig.competenciaFieldId, competencia: $node['Init Run'].json.runContext.competenciaYMD, first: Number($node['Init Run'].json.runContext.flags.prefetchPageSize || 200), after: (() => { const a = ($json.prefetchAfter ?? null); if (a === null) return null; const s = String(a).trim(); if (!s || s.toLowerCase() === 'null') return null; return s; })() } }}
